message:
fix: idle-monitor preserves port across restart cycles (bd-xvg)

The idle monitor removes the port file when stopping an idle server
(via stopServerProcess). When restarting, Start()/DefaultConfig()
cannot find the port file and falls through to DerivePort(), which
produces a hash-derived port that may differ from the original 3307.
This overwrites dolt-server.port with the wrong value, breaking other
bd/gt commands.

Fix: track the server port while running and restore the port file
before calling Start() on restart, so DefaultConfig() picks up the
correct port.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
